name: Beef Burger Mignon
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all filet ingredients except butter and seasoned salt in a large bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into six patties, each about 1 1/2 inches thick.
3. Place 1 teaspoon of butter in the center of each patty enclosure.
4. Wrap each patty tightly with foil strips (about 1 1/2 inches wide), folding over the ends to secure.
5. Sprinkle both sides of each patty with seasoned salt.
6. Chill while preparing mushrooms and sauce.
7. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a medium frying pan. Sauté mushroom caps until desired doneness is achieved; set aside.
8. Wipe out the pan for making the sauce.
9. Make the sauce by combining all sauce ingredients in the same pan. Simmer for about 10 minutes, or until slightly thickened. Keep warm.
10. Heat approximately 4 tablespoons of butter in a large heavy frying pan.
11. Cook the patties for 3 to 3 1/2 minutes on each side, ensuring they are slightly pink in the center.
12. Remove foil strips and place the patties on toast points on the serving plate.
13. Spoon sauce over the patties and top with mushroom caps.
14. Garnish with onion ruffles, carrot curls, and parsley.
15. Serve, and enjoy!
